message:
perf(bench): update widget benchmarks for new scoring algorithm

Update benchmark suite to cover the enhanced fuzzy scoring algorithm
in command palette.

- Add benchmarks for word boundary matching scenarios
- Include camelCase and snake_case input patterns
- Measure acronym matching performance
- Adjust baseline expectations for new algorithm complexity

The new scorer is ~15% slower per-item but produces significantly
better ranking, which is acceptable for typical palette sizes (<1000 items).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
